subject: feat(ui): move filters from below map to header dropdowns
body:
Filters (fuel type, radius) now live in the header as compact dropdown
buttons, left of the burger menu. This frees up vertical space for the
station list and map. FilterContext shares state between header UI and
home screen search logic.

Tags: ui, refactor, layout

Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
